title: SQL Injection & Secure Query Practices
description: The other side of the keyboard: how an attacker rewrites your query when user input is concatenated into it. Authentication bypass with ' OR '1'='1' --, UNION-based exfiltration through a search box, injected writes and blind injection. Then the one categorical fix — parameterized queries — plus defense in depth: allowlist validation for identifiers, least privilege, and safe error handling.

lessons.title: Witness the Breach: Bypass a Login
